description: This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Almaador. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
name: Formula: Enchant Weapon - Major Healing

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Formula: Enchant Weapon - Major Healing Phase 1 Item Level 70 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (350) Requires The Sha'tar - Revered Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant a melee weapon to increase healing by 81 and spell damage by 27. Permanently enchant a Melee Weapon to add +81 Healing and +27 Spell Damage. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 1 50 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Almaador. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
